message:
feat(core): add spawn_with_hints to sharded mux client, clarify dataflow merge semantics

sharding.rs (+72 lines, -16 refactored):
  - Add spawn_with_hints(&self, cwd, domain_name, agent_hint) method
    that accepts an optional AgentType hint for shard selection, enabling
    callers to direct pane spawning to agent-type-assigned shards
    without going through the WeztermInterface trait
  - Refactor the existing WeztermInterface::spawn_pane() implementation
    to delegate to spawn_with_hints(... None) internally, eliminating
    code duplication between the trait method and the new hint-aware path
  - Add spawn_with_agent_hint_uses_agent_assignment test verifying
    that Codex-hinted spawn routes to the configured shard while
    leaving the other shard empty

dataflow.rs (+5 lines doc):
  - Expand doc comment on DataflowGraph::merge() to document a known
    limitation: ComputeFn closures are not clonable, so merged compute
    and debounce nodes become inert sources retaining their last value;
    callers must re-register compute functions on remapped IDs if
    dynamic behavior is required after merge

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
